title: ALDE Party at 50: We Choose the Future
summary_full: For 50 years, ALDE Party – Alliance of Liberals and Democrats for Europe, has worked to shape a more open, democratic and forward-looking Europe. Since 1976, liberals across Europe have worked to expand freedoms, strengthen democratic institutions and create opportunities for people to thrive. This video looks back at some of those defining moments, but […]
